reviews.comment:
Todo bien. Baños. Full. Malísimo q no te quieran hacer boleta A cuando pagas por la aplicación de YPF. Solo te hacen si pagas en efectivo. Inexplicable

(Translated by Google)
Everything's fine. Bathrooms are full. It's terrible that they refuse to issue an A-type receipt when you pay through the YPF app. They only do it if you pay in cash. Inexplicable.
